title: Add MCPServer.resetInstance() and call from shutdown()
description: src/mcp/MCPServer.ts:67-113, 580-598: singleton has no reset hook. shutdown() doesn't clear static instance → zombie state on retry. Add static MCPServer.resetInstance() and call it from shutdown(). Also reset transports, middlewares, resources, tools maps.
validation: Test that getInstance() after shutdown() returns fresh instance with empty tools.
